title: impatiens xanthina var. pusilla
intro: Impatiens xanthina var. pusilla, also known as Himalayan balsam's dwarfed cousin, is a flowering plant belonging to the balsam family and native to the Himalayas. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Impatiens xanthina var. pusilla include treating fever, cough, and cold, as well as having antioxidant and analgesic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant are made by infusing its leaves and stems in water or oil to create teas, infusions, or ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
